# Label

Renders an accessible label associated with a form control.

## Installation

Add the Label component from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/label
```

## Usage

Give every form control a concise visible label. Match Label's `for` prop to a unique control `id`; this provides an accessible name and makes the label text part of the control's hit area.

**Checkbox label example**

```vue
<template>
  <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
    <Checkbox id="label-terms" />
    <Label for="label-terms">Accept the terms and conditions</Label>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Checkbox } from '@/Components/Checkbox'
import { Label } from '@/Components/Label'
</script>
```

## Writing labels

Name the value the user should provide, such as “Email address” or “Delivery method.” Put examples in supporting text rather than the label, and do not append a colon merely for layout. A placeholder disappears during entry and is not a substitute for Label.

## States

Label responds to a disabled peer control and to disabled state on a containing group. Keep the native `disabled` attribute on the control itself; muted label styling alone does not prevent interaction or announce the state. Show required and optional status consistently across the form, with text when the convention could be ambiguous.

## Composition

Label forwards Reka `as` and `as-child` props. Change the rendered element only when the result preserves label semantics and the `for` association. Read the [composition fundamentals](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/fundamentals/composition) before forwarding label behavior through a custom component.

## Accessibility

Avoid using only `aria-label` when visible text can identify the field. Do not associate one Label with several inputs. For a set of checkboxes or radio buttons, give each option its own label and use a semantic legend for the group question.

## Recommendations

> **Use Field Label inside a field composition: [Field](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/field)**
>
> Field Label adds the spacing and state hooks expected by Field. Use standalone Label for simple associations outside that composition.

Hosted documentation: [Label](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/label)
